_meta.note: Canonical manifest for the Value Lists editor layout (master-detail). preview.html is the pure interactive render; index.html is the inspector. The value-list DATA itself is the source of truth in ../../../value-lists/_index.json; the objects here describe the LAYOUT (what controls sit where + their bindings). Bindings are PROPOSED (no tables yet). Theme mirrors z-themes maw-dark-utility (provisional). Prior art: URITP Budget Value Lists page.

layout.name: VALUE_Lists
layout.recordScope: Found set of ValueLists; left rail selects one, right portal shows its ValueListItems.
layout.purpose: Central value-list documentation + editor for the app: define each list, how it derives, its members, its status-category mapping (for status lists), and which gLIST_ global keys point at it. This is the per-app value-list registry surfaced as an editable FileMaker layout.

theme.name: MAW Dark Utility
theme.tokensNote: MIRROR of z-themes tokens. Canonical source is the z-themes doc-set (separate agent migration). URITP prior art uses an amber+teal scheme; the themes doc-set decides the real palette.

objects.label: Area / title
objects.notes: Area label + teal title, matching URITP prior art header.

objects.label: Value Lists list
objects.notes: Portal/list of ValueLists on the anchor TO; selecting a row sets the detail context (g_SelectedValueList).

objects.label: IS_STATUS_LIST
objects.notes: When on, the STATUS mapping column shows in the item portal.

objects.label: ENFORCE 1-TO-1
objects.notes: Requires each item map to exactly one canonical status category.

objects.label: List members
objects.notes: Portal of the selected list's items. STATUS dropdown value list = VL_StatusCategories (canonical). Shown only when IsStatusList.

objects.label: add value
objects.notes: Blank creation row; commits a new ValueListItems record on entry.

objects.label: gLIST Assignments
objects.notes: Popover: each gLIST_ global key -> value-list dropdown. Keys live in Globals but are edited here, not on GLOBAL_Settings.
